settings.heading: Our Fleet
settings.subheading: From executive saloons to spacious vans — every vehicle is late-model, professionally maintained, and driven by a licensed chauffeur.

settings.title: Business Class
settings.models: Mercedes E-Class, BMW 5 Series, Audi A6, Cadillac XTS, or similar
settings.feature_2: Fits 2 carry-on bags, or 2 standard check-in, or 1 extra large check-in bag
settings.feature_3: Available in most of our business districts

settings.title: First Class
settings.models: Mercedes S-Class, BMW 7 Series, Audi A8, or similar
settings.feature_2: Fits 2 carry-on bags, or 2 standard check-in, or 1 extra large check-in bag
settings.feature_3: Available in most of our business districts

settings.title: Business Van / SUV
settings.models: Mercedes V-Class, Chevy Suburban, Cadillac Escalade, GMC Yukon Denali, or similar
settings.feature_2: Fits 12 carry-on bags or 8 standard check-in or 6 extra large check-in bags
settings.feature_3: Best for larger parties, lots of luggage, or families

settings.title: Electric Class
settings.models: Tesla Model S, Mercedes EQS, BMW iX, or similar

settings.title: First Class XL
settings.models: Mercedes GLS, BMW X7, Audi Q7, or similar
settings.feature_2: Fits 4 carry-on bags or 4 standard check-in bags
settings.feature_3: Ideal for families and executive travel

settings.title: Sprinter Van
settings.feature_3: Perfect for group transfers and events

settings.title: Late-model vehicles only
settings.description: Every vehicle in our fleet is no more than 3 years old, fully insured, and serviced to manufacturer standards.

settings.title: Transparent pricing
settings.description: No hidden fees. The price you see at booking is the price you pay — distance-based and always inclusive of the driver.

settings.title: Available 24 / 7
settings.description: Our fleet operates around the clock, every day of the year — early morning departures and late night arrivals included.
